_comment: video-development composes atoms into a full production package; every concept yields at least 3 standalone clips alongside the long-form outline.
description: Hook, title options, outline, thumbnail concept, SEO description, and 3 or more short-form clips.
note: The user can call any shortcut atom directly without running the full workflow. footage-analysis serves the footage_breakdown routing: raw-footage transcript to chapter and cut suggestions, then chapter-map for fan-out. silence-scan and scene-scan measure raw media directly (tools/videoedit/mediaprobe.py) when it is available, degrading to the transcript floor.
